prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7166名、8316名、8085名、8193名、9165名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2022年位次后移约1150名，2023年小 幅回升至8085名后再度后移，2024年8193名，2025年大幅后移至9165名，近两年累计后移约972名，下行趋势明显；该校在天津市综合类招生计划持续扩增：202 1年32人、2022年35人、2023年36人、2024年41人、2025年42人，2026年（招生计划文件）进一步扩至44人，较2025年增加2人，扩招约4.76%。扩招在一定程度上缓解了竞争压力 ，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学排名第76位，近年排名稳定在76–77名区间，属于全国中上游水平。2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件，无重大负面舆情冲击；抖音热度未进入全国高校前106名，短视频平台关注度一般， 未出现明显的报考热度异常信号；该校在安全科学与工程（A+）、测绘科学与技术（A-）、土木工程（A-）等学科领域具有突出优势，与招生专业中的安全科学 与工程类、测绘类、土木工程等高度对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高， 该校开设的计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化、人工智能等专业受益于行业热度；天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模显著扩 大，竞争加剧；该校位于北京市，与天津市地理位置邻近，对天津考生具有天然的地域吸引力；该校在天津的招生计划占 比较小（约44人），属于小规模招生，位次波动对计划变化较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+4.76%）、天津市考生规模大幅增长 （约+14%）以及学校声誉平稳等因素，竞争压力总体加大。在2025年基准位次9165名基础上，经供需弹性调整后预测2026年最低录取位次约9477名，区间为8977–9977名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约9477名，区间8977–9977名。位次在区间下限（8977名）以内可重点冲刺一档专业（人工智能、计算机、电气等热门工科）；位次在区间中部（约9477名）建议以二档 专业为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（9977名）附近建议以二档保底专业为主，三档专业作为稳妥选择。该校安全科学与工程类（A+学科）为2026年新增招生专业，值得关 注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin were approximately 7166, 8316, 8085, 8193, and 9165, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking moved back by about 1150 places; in 2023, it slightly recovered to 8085 before moving back again; in 2024, it was 8193; and in 2025, it significantly moved back to 9165, with a cumulative backward movement of about 972 places in the last two years, indicating a clear downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin has been continuously expanding: 32 students in 2021, 35 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 42 in 2025, and further expanded to 44 students in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4.76%. The expansion has alleviated competitive pressure to some extent, but the magnitude is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in 2026, it ranked 76th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 76–77 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion impact; its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 national universities, indicating average attention on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. The university has outstanding advantages in disciplines such as Safety Science and Engineering (A+), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology (A-), and Civil Engineering (A-), which highly correspond to the enrollment majors like Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social popularity. The university's offerings in Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Artificial Intelligence benefit from industry trends. In 2026, the total number of Tianjin college entrance examination registrants is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which is geographically close to Tianjin, providing natural regional appeal to Tianjin candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin is relatively small (about 44 students), making it a small-scale enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+4.76%), the significant increase in the number of Tianjin candidates (about +14%), and the stable reputation of the university, competitive pressure is generally increasing. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 9165, after supply-demand elasticity adjustment, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 9477, with a range of 8977–9977.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 9477, with a range of 8977–9977. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (8977) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, etc., popular engineering fields); those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 9477) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors, while also considering Tier 1 as a reach; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (9977) should primarily choose Tier 2 safe majors, with Tier 3 majors as a stable option. The university's Safety Science and Engineering (A+ discipline) is a new enrollment major for 2026, worth attention.
